[FEATURE]
What problem does this solve?
Describe the feature you’d like
Who would benefit from this?
☐	All users
☐	Admins / organizers only
☐	Just me (internal workflow improvement)
Example or mockup
Priority
☐	🔴 High — needed for next event / release
☐	🟡 Medium — would be a meaningful improvement
☐	🟢 Low — nice to have someday
